Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner Susan Sanwa
The Court stated that the issue was that the Probate Examiner had sent out notes and received no response. Ms. Stoneman replied that she didn't know what information was available that had not already been provided to the Court. The Court informed Ms. Stoneman that she needed to go through the Examiner's Notes and address each of the issues raised to the best of her ability. She agreed to do so. The hearing on the Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance, no courtesy copies of the petition or supporting documents, that there is a proposed order but no basis to review this matter. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee was continued to June 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If no courtesy copies are delivered 3 days prior to this date the matter will go off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
